basic_details.job_title: GCF Jabalpur Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur (GCF Jabalpur) Recruitment 2026: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur has released the official notification for 5 Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from date of publication of advertisement in employment news

age_limit.details: Maximum Age for All Posts: 52 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science or related fields, B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Mechatronics, B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Instrumentation, B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Aerospace, B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical / Electronics / Control / Mechatronics
qualification.details: Specialist-I (Metallurgical Engineering): B.E./B.Tech. in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science or related fields Specialist-I (Hydraulics & Pneumatic Systems): B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Mechatronics Specialist-II (Electronics Engineering): B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Instrumentation Specialist-II FEA (Finite Element Analysis): B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Aerospace Specialist-I (Control Systems): B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical / Electronics / Control / Mechatronics

selection_process: Technical Evaluation (Written / Practical Test) Interview / Expert Panel Assessment
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GCF Jabalpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15 days from date of publication of advertisement in employment news.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GCF Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GCF Jabalpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GCF Jabalpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GCF Jabalpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Specialist-I (Metallurgical Engineering): B.E./B.Tech. in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science or related fields Specialist-I (Hydraulics & Pneumatic Systems): B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Mechatronics Specialist-II (Electronics Engineering): B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Instrumentation Specialist-II FEA (Finite Element Analysis): B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical / Aerospace Specialist-I (Control Systems): B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical / Electronics / Control / Mechatronics

content_sections.text: Maximum Age for All Posts: 52 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GCF Jabalpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GCF Jabalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts at GCF Jabalpur is 18 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GCF Jabalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts in various disciplines under the GCF Jabalpur Recruitment 2026. These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for GCF Jabalpur Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-. However, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GCF Jabalpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts must not exceed 52 years of age. This is the maximum age limit specified for all advertised positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Specialist-I and Specialist-II posts at GCF Jabalpur?
faq.answer: The salary for Specialist-I posts is Rs. 1,75,000/- per month, while Specialist-II posts offer a salary of Rs. 1,25,000/- per month. This varies based on the specific post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for GCF Jabalpur Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the GCF Jabalpur Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts is online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the direct link provided to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. What are the qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. degree in relevant engineering fields such as Metallurgical, Mechanical, Mechatronics, Electronics, Communication, Instrumentation, Aerospace, Electrical, or Control systems, depending on the specific specialist post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for GCF Jabalpur Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Technical Evaluation, which may include a written or practical test, followed by an Interview or Expert Panel Assessment. Candidates will be assessed on their technical skills and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for these GCF Jabalpur vacancies?
faq.answer: The job location for these Specialist-I / Specialist-II posts is Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. Selected candidates will be working at the Gun Carriage Factory in Jabalpur.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for GCF Jabalpur Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, while the notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh, government job notifications are generally open to eligible Indian citizens from across the country unless specified otherwise. Always check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.
